displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) Annual #2: Winloss And Nokk
synopsis: One's a cyborg with a bad attitude, the other's a cold-blooded reptile. They're happily married. They've been hired by a mysterious contact to bag an ultra-deadly monster from the heart of an ancient temple. N.B.: For "mysterious contact" read DOCTOR APHRA, who — and this will shock you — is definitely up to something. N.B.: For "happily married" read THIS IS GOING TO GET MESSY
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) Annual #2: Winloss And Nokk
